name: drift-detect ignores yaml files that lack a `source:` block (operator overlays, _meta)
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' > tree/real.yaml
